access.guest_fallback_message: Detailed explanations are available for logged-in Saola students only.

q33.explanation: Cần điền/chọn thông tin đúng từ bài đọc. Ở đoạn 3, bài viết nêu: "Supporters of skiing claim that most animals avoid areas with skiers and many resorts say they protect wildlife by fencing off ski slopes and areas of hibernation; however, this fencing requires never-ending care and upkeep, which increase costs. In many resorts, sensitive mountain areas such as breeding and tree plantation zones are simply left undefended against off-piste skiers, as their owners are unwilling to pay to install and maintain the fencing.". Cụm resorts khớp với yêu cầu câu hỏi và đúng giới hạn từ nếu đề có quy định.
q33.evidence: Supporters of skiing claim that most animals avoid areas with skiers and many resorts say they protect wildlife by fencing off ski slopes and areas of hibernation; however, this fencing requires never-ending care and upkeep, which increase costs. In many resorts, sensitive mountain areas such as breeding and tree plantation zones are simply left undefended against off-piste skiers, as their owners are unwilling to pay to install and maintain the fencing._

q34.explanation: Cần điền/chọn thông tin đúng từ bài đọc. Ở đoạn 5, bài viết nêu: "In times of low snowfall, resort operators are increasingly turning to the use of artificial snow. This is made by snow cannons spraying water at great pressure into the cold mountain air, as a result of which the water freezes and then falls as snow. To obtain good-quality artificial snow, bacteria are frequently mixed with the water to form better snowflakes.". Cụm bacteria khớp với yêu cầu câu hỏi và đúng giới hạn từ nếu đề có quy định.
q34.evidence: In times of low snowfall, resort operators are increasingly turning to the use of artificial snow. This is made by snow cannons spraying water at great pressure into the cold mountain air, as a result of which the water freezes and then falls as snow. To obtain good-quality artificial snow, bacteria are frequently mixed with the water to form better snowflakes._

q35.explanation: Cần điền/chọn thông tin đúng từ bài đọc. Ở đoạn 5, bài viết nêu: "However, the manufacture of artificial snow is costly and uses large amounts of water, the same water which often shelters rare species of animal and which in itself is a commodity. According to some sources, one day’s use of snow cannons in a busy resort can consume as much water as a small town in two days. Water companies have stated that this can affect water supplies to ordinary households in the areas around snow resorts.". Cụm water companies khớp với yêu cầu câu hỏi và đúng giới hạn từ nếu đề có quy định.
q35.evidence: However, the manufacture of artificial snow is costly and uses large amounts of water, the same water which often shelters rare species of animal and which in itself is a commodity. According to some sources, one day’s use of snow cannons in a busy resort can consume as much water as a small town in two days. Water companies have stated that this can affect water supplies to ordinary households in the areas around snow resorts._

q36.explanation: Cần điền/chọn thông tin đúng từ bài đọc. Ở đoạn 6, bài viết nêu: "Natural lakes can be used, but environmentalists often disapprove of using this type of water source. Accordingly, the creation of an artificial lake sometimes becomes necessary. If this is well planned, it may also serve as a reservoir for fire-fighting water.". Cụm fire-fighting khớp với yêu cầu câu hỏi và đúng giới hạn từ nếu đề có quy định.
q36.evidence: Natural lakes can be used, but environmentalists often disapprove of using this type of water source. Accordingly, the creation of an artificial lake sometimes becomes necessary. If this is well planned, it may also serve as a reservoir for fire-fighting water._

q37.explanation: Cần điền/chọn thông tin đúng từ bài đọc. Ở đoạn 7, bài viết nêu: "As they usually lack the water flow of natural lakes and therefore do not get enough oxygen, carbon dioxide levels in the water build up and create a significant increase in algae. The resulting byproducts of these tiny plant organisms become poisonous over time and can kill any introduced fish or other animals. When the water is used to create artificial snow, it can spread this poison onto the land as well.". Cụm algae khớp với yêu cầu câu hỏi và đúng giới hạn từ nếu đề có quy định.
q37.evidence: As they usually lack the water flow of natural lakes and therefore do not get enough oxygen, carbon dioxide levels in the water build up and create a significant increase in algae. The resulting byproducts of these tiny plant organisms become poisonous over time and can kill any introduced fish or other animals. When the water is used to create artificial snow, it can spread this poison onto the land as well._
